etymology.description: 品(品) (pǐn, "three mouths") + 木(木) (mù, "tree") = chirping of birds in a tree
etymology.interpretation: The character 喿(zào) graphically combines three mouths 品(品) atop a tree 木(木) to symbolize the sound of birds chirping in a tree. This imagery effectively captures the idea of abundant sounds emanating from one location, akin to a chorus of birds.
